basics.name: Frank Aldape Guzmán
basics.label: Software Engineer | Frontend & Full-Stack Developer focused on quality, scalability, and user experience

summary.paragraph: I am a passionate developer focused on building modern, fluid, and scalable applications that improve users' lives. I specialize in frontend and full-stack development, applying best practices to deliver clean, efficient, and sustainable solutions.

I've worked with multidisciplinary teams in sectors such as fintech, telecommunications, and digital banking—combining software architecture, technical leadership, and agile project management to maximize product impact.
I'm motivated by continuous learning and the adoption of new technologies to streamline processes, enhance performance, and bring value both technically and strategically.

work.name: SOLPRO
work.summary: Led frontend architecture and development for enterprise applications. Defined technical standards, mentored junior developers, and drove adoption of best practices to ensure code quality and scalability across the team.

work.name: Millicom (Tigo)
work.summary: Contributed to the mobile development of a fintech wallet deployed across six countries. Collaborated with cross-functional teams on Flutter-based solutions, integrated serverless functions on AWS Lambda, and helped maintain consistent performance across all markets.

work.name: Grupo Financiero Banorte
work.summary: Contributed to the development of digital banking portals and MVPs for new products at one of Mexico's largest financial institutions. Collaborated closely with product and design teams to deliver functional, high-quality web experiences.

work.name: Freelance Professional
work.summary: Independently led end-to-end development projects for multiple clients. Managed requirements, delivery timelines, and stakeholder communication while building scalable web and mobile solutions with React, Angular, Node.js, and React Native.

work.name: AlphaCredit Capital
work.summary: Contributed to fintech application development using Angular, Node.js, Kotlin, and Java. Participated in API integrations and collaborated with the team on improvements that increased system reliability and cross-platform consistency.

work.name: Apoyo Promotora
work.summary: Led the Technical Support area, managing team operations and improving service quality metrics. Identified process bottlenecks and implemented automated software solutions that reduced response times and increased operational efficiency.

education.area: Master's in Business Administration with a specialization in Finance

projects.name: Kaching App
projects.description: Mobile point-of-sale (POS) application developed for entrepreneurs, independent sellers, and local businesses. Kaching! allows users to manage products, customers, orders, commissions, and deliveries directly from their phone, making it easy to sell anytime, anywhere.
highlights: Developed with React Native for cross-platform performance
Integrated secure authentication and user sessions
Published on App Store and Google Play

projects.name: Tigo Money Wallet
projects.description: Digital wallet and mobile payment application deployed across six countries: Bolivia, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Panama, and Paraguay. A single codebase localized per market, enabling users to send and receive money, pay bills, top up mobile credit, and manage their personal finances from their smartphone.
highlights: Developed with Flutter for cross-platform performance
Real-time balance updates and push notifications
Integrated secure authentication and biometric login
